name: CYBER BLADE - 游戏资源生成
description: 使用 Z-Image-Turbo 快速生成赛博朋克风格的游戏资源

inputs.text: cyberpunk pixel art, top-down 2D game character, neon glowing robot, dark background, game sprite, flat design, vector style, clean edges, game asset
3d, photorealistic, realistic, blurry, low quality, distorted, ugly, deformed, text, watermark, signature

nodes.title: 采样器 (低步数快速生成)

player.positive: cyberpunk pixel art, top-down 2D game character, neon cyan robot warrior, glowing blue energy core, holding futuristic gun, game sprite, clean flat design, dark background, centered, game asset, 2D top-down view

enemy_basic.positive: cyberpunk pixel art, top-down 2D game enemy, red flying drone, glowing red LED eyes, mechanical, game sprite, clean flat design, dark background, centered

enemy_fast.positive: cyberpunk pixel art, top-down 2D game enemy, orange sleek speedster robot, streamlined, fast looking, game sprite, clean flat design, dark background, centered

enemy_tank.positive: cyberpunk pixel art, top-down 2D game enemy, purple heavy armored mech, bulky robot tank, thick armor plates, game sprite, clean flat design, dark background, centered

enemy_ranged.positive: cyberpunk pixel art, top-down 2D game enemy, pink sniper robot, long range attacker, targeting laser, game sprite, clean flat design, dark background, centered

enemy_boss.positive: cyberpunk pixel art, top-down 2D game boss, massive red demonic mecha, giant glowing red core, intimidating, game sprite, clean flat design, dark background, centered, epic

item_weapon.positive: cyberpunk pixel art, top-down 2D game item, futuristic glowing weapon pickup, neon cyan gun, game sprite, clean flat design, dark background, centered

item_health.positive: cyberpunk pixel art, top-down 2D game item, glowing red health pack, medical cross, neon heartbeat, game sprite, clean flat design, dark background, centered

item_currency.positive: cyberpunk pixel art, top-down 2D game item, glowing gold coin, neon currency chip, game sprite, clean flat design, dark background, centered

background_tile.positive: cyberpunk pixel art, top-down 2D tileable ground texture, neon grid floor, dark purple metal panels, seamless pattern, game background
background_tile.negative: 3d, photorealistic, blurry, low quality, text, characters

usage_instructions.step1: 将本 JSON 文件拖入 ComfyUI 界面以加载工作流
usage_instructions.step2: 确保已下载 z-image-turbo.safetensors 模型并放入 ComfyUI/models/checkpoints/ 目录
usage_instructions.step3: 将上方 asset_prompts 中对应资源的 'positive' 文本复制到正向提示词节点中
usage_instructions.step4: 点击 Queue Prompt 生成图像，每次约 1-3 秒
usage_instructions.step5: 生成的图片保存到 ComfyUI/output/ 目录，裁剪后放入 game/assets/ 使用
usage_instructions.step6: 建议分辨率: 512x512，生成后用图片编辑工具裁剪出单个素材
